name: orchestrator
description: Coordinator agent for the PerfPilot performance-testing pipeline. Routes user requests to specialist agents (execution, script, monitoring, analysis, reporting, notifications), supervises long-running tasks, and brokers human-in-the-loop approvals. PBI 3.7.1 scaffold: conversational surface is live; delegation tools (list_available_specialists / delegate_to_specialist / check_task_status / request_human_approval) ship in PBIs 3.7.3-3.7.6, after which `status` flips to `available` and `skills[]` enumerates the real capabilities. See `agent_framework/agents/orchestrator/INSTRUCTIONS.md` for the agent's runtime system prompt.
